name: Sofa
description:
Client is a single mother caring for her 9-year-old daughter and is currently dependent on ComCare assistance to meet the family's basic needs.

Following an incident involving her ex-partner, essential kitchen fixtures, including the kitchen cabinet and gas stove, were damaged and are no longer usable. As client has limited financial means and is prioritising her daughter's daily needs and household expenses, she is unable to replace these items independently.

The loss of these kitchen facilities has affected the family's ability to prepare meals safely and conveniently at home. Donations of a kitchen cabinet and gas stove, or suitable replacement items, would help restore a safe and functional living environment while alleviating the family's financial strain during this challenging period.

passiton.description:
- Two Comfortable 2-seater sofas
- Each sofa is 250cm (L) x 100 cm (W) x 40cm (H)
- Great for living rooms and entertainment areas
- Easy to customize and arrange
- The backrests can be moved as you like or completely removed to convert each sofa to a temporary bed.
- 2 cover sets available - dark brown and green. So you can use one cover set while one cover set goes for dry cleaning. One cover set dry cleaned and packed already.
- Original price with extra cover set - S$ 2700
- Bought from Cosimo

name: Chest of drawers
description: Client requires a chest of drawer for herself and younger daughter. Client has financial difficulty due to family conflict, health issues and unemployment.

contact.org: Care Corner Family Service Centre - Tampines
contact.name: Jessica Lim

passiton.name: IKEA - HEMNES Chest of 8 drawers, white stain, 160x96 cm
passiton.description:
A heavily used chest of drawers, perfect for the bedroom or living room. You can simply repaint them, and it will look like a brand new item again. 

Description from IKEA:
A classic chest of drawers in solid wood, with a traditional look and modern functions like quiet, smooth-running drawers. The drawer interlock reduces the tip-over risk when combined with wall-anchoring.

passiton.name: SUNDVIK Changing table/chest of drawers - white
passiton.description: Here you can have everything from diapers and creams to clothes and toys close at hand. And when the diaper stage is over, fold and fix the changing table’s leaf in place to create a chest of drawers.
passiton.dimensions: Width: 78 cm Min. depth: 54 cm Max. depth: 79 cm Depth of drawer (inside): 46 cm Min. height: 99 cm Max. height: 108 cm Free height under furniture: 18 cm Max. load: 13.60 kg

name: Nebulizer Machine
description: Client lives alone and has limited family support. She has been unemployed since 2014 due to asthma. Client reported ongoing depression and chronic skin condition since 2017, with no significant improvement despite ongoing medical treatment. Client shared that her doctor recommended the use of a nebulizer machine; however, she is unable to purchase one due to lack of income.(JM)

contact.name: Low Kim Yong

name: Bicycle
description:
Client is a breast cancer survivor, has recently completed her treatment and suffered from multiple side effects (heart issues and swelling of eyes and nose). While her condition has improved, she is facing difficulties securing employment that is fit for her current condition.

Client is unemployed, living in a 1-room rental flat and without any family support. She hopes for a bicycle to allow her to do Grab to provide for herself.

name: Adult Diapers
description:
The client is an elderly lady who is widowed and living with her grand-daughter. She has experienced many life challenges, one of which is a physical disability. As such, she is unfit for work. 

She needs to wear a specific brand of diapers, called Depend Protect+, Absorbent pants, size L.

She also needs to take Fybogel (Orange), which is costly for her.
